<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping

custom-to-root-context combined with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*; the proxy adds the /app prefix and rewrites /app/ui/HILLA back to /HILLA on the backend (Hilla push lives at the context root). The catch-all carries everything else, including /app/ui/connect/* (handled by the Vaadin servlet) and root-level static resources.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
# App at backend root, Vaadin servlet at /ui/*. The proxy adds a public /app
# prefix and forwards everything else as a catch-all so root-level resources
# (/VAADIN/*, /sw.js, /styles.css, /manifest.webmanifest, /test-redirect,
# Spring Boot routes, etc.) reach the backend. The catch-all carries
# upgrade=websocket so /app/ui/VAADIN/push works.
#
# Hilla push lives at /HILLA on the backend regardless of vaadin.url-mapping
# (see https://github.com/vaadin/hilla/issues/289), so the proxy strips both
# /app and /ui for that path. /connect/* needs no custom rule — the Vaadin
# servlet at /ui/* handles it via the catch-all.

ProxyPassMatch   "^/app/ui/HILLA/(.*)$"  http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/$1 upgrade=websocket
ProxyPass        "/app/"                 http://vaadin:8080/ upgrade=websocket
ProxyPassReverse "/app/ui/HILLA/"        http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/
ProxyPassReverse "/app/"                 http://vaadin:8080/
ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/" "/app"
```
